note: Official expectation model only — live integration NOT executed.
authMethod: SSH transport (RFC 4253) with public-key authentication; SFTP subsystem runs over the SSH channel. Host-key verification pins the server.
keyEndpoints: SSH_FXP_OPEN / READ / WRITE / CLOSE -> file transfer

expectedSuccessResponseShape.hostKey: Host key fingerprint matches the pinned SHA256 value.

expectedFailureResponseShape.hostKeyChanged: WARNING: REMOTE HOST IDENTIFICATION HAS CHANGED! (host key verification failed)
expectedFailureResponseShape.connRefused: ssh: connect to host sftp.example.local port 22: Connection refused

commonIntegrationFailure: Permission denied (publickey) when the wrong key/user is used or the key is not authorized; host-key-changed warning (possible MITM) when the pinned fingerprint mismatches.
preventionRule: Use key-based auth with the private key held in a vault; pin and verify the server host-key fingerprint; fail closed on host-key mismatch.
